ci_support_linux_64_r_base4.4.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cran_mirror:
- https://cran.r-project.org
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  r-base:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
r_base:
- '4.4'
target_platform:
- linux-64

about.summary: Implementation of methods Extremum Surface Estimator (ESE) and Extremum Distance Estimator (EDE) to identify the inflection point of a curve . Christopoulos, DT (2014) <doi:10.48550/arXiv.1206.5478> . Christopoulos, DT (2016) <https://demovtu.veltech.edu.in/wp-content/uploads/2016/04/Paper-04-2016.pdf> . Christopoulos, DT (2016) <doi:10.2139/ssrn.3043076> .

Implementation of methods Extremum Surface Estimator (ESE) and Extremum Distance Estimator (EDE) to identify the inflection point of a curve . Christopoulos, DT (2014) <doi:10.48550/arXiv.1206.5478> . Christopoulos, DT (2016) <https://demovtu.veltech.edu.in/wp-content/uploads/2016/04/Paper-04-2016.pdf> . Christopoulos, DT (2016) <doi:10.2139/ssrn.3043076> .

name: r-inflection
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set version = '1.3.7' %}
{% set posix = 'm2-' if win else '' %}

package:
  name: r-inflection
  version: "{{ version|replace('-', '_') }}"

source:
  url:
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/inflection_{{ version }}.tar.gz
    - {{ cran_mirror }}/src/contrib/Archive/inflection/inflection_{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: fc32c772069c6ca245728f27cb524aaf57ca812f6197f5bb201009dee2790211

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: generic
  rpaths:
    - lib/R/lib/
    - lib/
  missing_dso_whitelist:
    - '*/R.dll'        # [win]
    - '*/Rblas.dll'    # [win]
    - '*/Rlapack.dll'  # [win]

requirements:
  build:
    - {{ posix }}zip               # [win]
    - cross-r-base {{ r_base }}    # [build_platform != target_platform]
  host:
    - r-base
  run:
    - r-base

test:
  commands:
    - $R -e "library('inflection')"           # [not win]
    - "\"%R%\" -e \"library('inflection')\""  # [win]

about:
  home: https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=inflection
  license: GPL-2.0-only
  summary: Implementation of methods Extremum Surface Estimator (ESE) and Extremum Distance Estimator
    (EDE) to identify the inflection point of a curve . Christopoulos, DT (2014) <doi:10.48550/arXiv.1206.5478>
    . Christopoulos, DT (2016) <https://demovtu.veltech.edu.in/wp-content/uploads/2016/04/Paper-04-2016.pdf>
    . Christopoulos, DT (2016) <doi:10.2139/ssrn.3043076> .
  license_family: GPL2
  license_file:
    - '{{ environ["PREFIX"] }}/lib/R/share/licenses/GPL-2'

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - conda-forge/r

# Description: Implementation of methods Extremum Surface Estimator (ESE) and Extremum Distance Estimator (EDE) to identify the inflection point of a curve . Christopoulos, DT (2014) <doi:10.48550/arXiv.1206.5478> . Christopoulos, DT (2016) <https://demovtu.veltech.edu.in/wp-content/uploads/2016/04/Paper-04-2016.pdf> .
